My Stakes

STAKE TOKEN, EARN TOKEN

Stake. Earn.
Claim Rewards.

Stake your TOKEN token and earn more TOKEN as a reward. Our intuitive, easy to use interface will help you safely stake and start earning today!

TOKEN’s staking platform is audited and monitored 24/7 by CertiK to ensure your security.

Connect your wallet. It's as easy as 1, 2, 3.

Get Started

Connect your wallet. TOKEN's staking platform is audited and monitored 24/7 by CertiK to ensure your security.

Determine Stake Amount

Determine the amount of TOKEN tokens you want to stake. You can stake part or ALL of your TOKEN tokens.

Choose a Plan

Choose the duration of your stake. The longer the stake duration, the better the rewards.

Earn Rewards

Rewards are always yours when you stake with TOKEN. Choose to re-stake or claim anytime.

Supercharger

Amplify your crypto journey with Supercharger.

Unlock exclusive perks and accelerate your crypto investments with every stake.

Earn more by staking

Advance in the Supercharger ranks by increasing your stake.

Get early access in sales

Enjoy up to 60 minutes of early access in token sales, giving you a competitive edge in the market.

Outbuy the competition

Boost your rank by staking actively and enable larger transactions during launches.

Enjoy exclusive perks

Advance through levels from Apprentice to Champion, unlocking unique perks that enhance your crypto experience.

Your security and convenience is our priority

The TOKEN staking program was designed with a focus on security and user experience to ensure a seamless staking experience.

18,000+

HOLDERS

With over 18,000 holders, TokenFi has proven itself as a trusted cryptocurrency.

800 Million+

REACH

TokenFi's strategic marketing moves have introduced TokenFi to 800 Million+ people.

$61.7 Million+

STAKED

608.8 Million $TOKEN

TokenFi is a tokenization platform targeting the tokenization industry which is projected to be worth $16 trillion by 2030. TokenFi aims to give users all they need to create successful crypto tokens or tokenize an asset in a simple all-in-one platform without writing a single line of code!
